takeaway.en: Aurora is the operating system for premium cross-border commerce.
takeaway.zh: Aurora 是高端跨境零售的运营系统。

text.en: Aurora Commerce OS For Premium Retail Launches
text.zh: 面向高端零售发布的 Aurora Commerce OS

copy.en: A five-slide reference build for bounded, bilingual web presentations.
copy.zh: 一个用于受限视口双语 Web 演示的五页参考样张。

assets.notes: Tonal field and proof number cluster.

proportional_spatial_map.notes: Left-heavy title mass with proof chip cluster on the right.

mobile_degradation_plan.reflow_threshold: Only if the title becomes illegible after scaling.

slides.negative_space_strategy: Use one calm field around the title to create authority.
slides.counterweight_strategy: Balance the title with a right-side proof chip cluster.

takeaway.en: Aurora connects launch planning, live operations, and retention into one loop.
takeaway.zh: Aurora 将发布策划、实时运营和复购留存连接成一个闭环。

text.en: One Loop Connects Planning, Launch, And Retention
text.zh: 一个闭环贯通策划、发布与留存

copy.en: The central loop is the proof object; the side note clarifies why the loop compounds operational efficiency.
copy.zh: 中央闭环本身就是证明装置，侧边说明只负责解释它如何叠加运营效率。

proportional_spatial_map.notes: Diagram centered, note panel attached to the lower-right.

mobile_degradation_plan.reflow_threshold: If node labels collide after scaling.
mobile_degradation_plan.notes: Keep the loop visible before collapsing any notes.

slides.negative_space_strategy: Keep the outer field quiet so the loop remains the visual magnet.
slides.counterweight_strategy: Use the attached note panel and title band as the balancing mass.

takeaway.en: The rollout moves through four controlled phases over twelve weeks.
takeaway.zh: 整个 rollout 在十二周内分四个受控阶段推进。

text.en: A Twelve-Week Rollout Moves Through Four Distinct Phases
text.zh: 十二周 rollout 分四个明确阶段推进

copy.en: Each phase has one job, one owner, and one measurable readiness signal.
copy.zh: 每个阶段都对应一个任务、一个 owner 和一个可度量的 readiness 信号。

proportional_spatial_map.notes: Timeline takes the center band, note below.

mobile_degradation_plan.reflow_threshold: If node labels drop below readable size.
mobile_degradation_plan.notes: Mobile may flip to a vertical rail, but must still fit within one slide.

slides.negative_space_strategy: Leave quiet space above and below the rail so sequence reads cleanly.
slides.counterweight_strategy: Use milestone chips and the title band to hold the composition.

takeaway.en: The product experience proves that operational rigor can still feel premium.
takeaway.zh: 产品体验证明，运营严谨性也可以保持高级感。

text.en: A Premium Experience Does Not Need To Sacrifice Control
text.zh: 高级体验不必牺牲运营控制力

copy.en: The large sample is the hero. The note panel stays tight and does not become a second gallery.
copy.zh: 大样图是主角，侧边说明必须收紧，不能再变成第二组 gallery。

assets.notes: Use one strong product visual instead of several equal samples.

proportional_spatial_map.notes: Large sample left, note panel right.

mobile_degradation_plan.reflow_threshold: Only if the sample annotation becomes unreadable.
mobile_degradation_plan.notes: Scale first; preserve the single-sample focus.

slides.negative_space_strategy: Let the sample breathe and keep margins quiet around it.
slides.counterweight_strategy: Hold the far side with one compact note stack.

takeaway.en: The team is ready for a phased pilot with one executive sponsor.
takeaway.zh: 团队已准备好在一位高层 sponsor 支持下进入分阶段 pilot。

text.en: Approve A Twelve-Week Pilot With One Executive Sponsor
text.zh: 批准一项为期十二周、由一位高层 sponsor 牵头的 pilot

copy.en: Decision, owner, and success metric are grouped into one close panel so the ending feels resolved.
copy.zh: 决策、owner 和成功指标被收束到一个 closing panel 中，确保结尾是有收口感的。

proportional_spatial_map.notes: Closing statement on top, decision panel below.

mobile_degradation_plan.reflow_threshold: Only if the decision panel labels break.

slides.negative_space_strategy: Use top breathing room to make the close feel decisive rather than crowded.
slides.counterweight_strategy: Decision panel anchors the lower field and closes the deck.
